gen.title: JSON Mock Data Generator
gen.subtitle: Paste a JSON template, auto-infer types, and generate realistic random sample data. Supports nested objects and arrays.
gen.toast_paste: Please paste a JSON template first
gen.placeholder:
Paste a sample JSON structure here...

The tool will auto-detect each field's type and generate random values.

Example:
{
  "id": 1,
  "name": "Alice",
  "email": "a@b.com",
  "age": 25,
  "active": true
}
gen.result_placeholder: Generated mock data will appear here...
gen.how_it_works_desc: Paste a sample JSON structure as a template, set the record count (1-1000), then click Generate. The tool auto-detects field types and generates matching random values.
gen.feature_type_desc: Strings → random names / Numbers → random values / Booleans → random true/false / Email format → random email
gen.feature_array_desc: Arrays in your template will generate 2-4 random elements, perfect for list data.
gen.feature_nested_desc: Supports any depth of nested JSON structures. Addresses, configs, deep data — all generated.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.info_desc: JSON Tool Pro is a pure frontend application. Your JSON data is processed entirely in your browser and is never sent to any server. We do not collect or store your personal data or the JSON content you work with.
privacy.cookies_desc: We may use essential cookies to ensure the site functions properly. No tracking cookies are used without your consent. If Google AdSense is enabled, Google may use cookies for ad personalization. You can manage cookie preferences in your browser settings.
privacy.third_party_desc: This site may use Google AdSense to display advertisements. Google may collect certain information (such as your IP address and browser type) to serve relevant ads. For more details, please see Google's Privacy Policy.
privacy.ads_desc: We use Google AdSense to display ads. Google uses cookies to serve ads based on your previous visits to this site or other websites.
privacy.ads_optout: You can opt out of personalized advertising by visiting Google's Ad Settings: https://adssettings.google.com
privacy.contact_desc: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at:
contact.title: Contact Us
contact.response: We will respond to your inquiry as soon as possible.
home.usp_privacy_desc: 100% client-side processing. Your JSON data never leaves your browser.
home.usp_speed_desc: No server round-trips. Every operation completes in milliseconds, right in your browser.
home.usp_tools_desc: Format, validate, convert, diff, edit Markdown, test regex, format code, and more — all in one place.
home.usecase_api_desc: Format and compare API responses to spot differences instantly.
home.usecase_frontend_desc: Convert JSON responses to TypeScript interfaces in one click.
home.usecase_backend_desc: Generate Java POJO classes from JSON automatically.
home.usecase_data_desc: Convert JSON to CSV for easy analysis in Excel or Sheets.
home.hero_title: 15+ Free Online JSON Tools — Format, Validate, Convert & More
home.hero_sub: The all-in-one JSON toolkit that runs 100% in your browser. Your data never leaves your device. Format JSON, validate syntax, convert to CSV/YAML/Java/TypeScript, diff documents, and more — all free, no sign-up.
home.desc_formatter: Format, beautify & validate JSON with syntax highlighting
home.desc_validator: Check JSON syntax errors with detailed error messages
home.desc_csv: Convert JSON arrays to CSV format for Excel & Sheets
home.desc_ts: Generate TypeScript interfaces from JSON data
home.desc_java: Generate Java classes with getters & setters
home.desc_jsonpath: Query JSON data with JSONPath expressions
home.desc_diff: Compare two JSON documents side by side
home.desc_compressor: Minify JSON to reduce file size
home.desc_yaml: Convert JSON to YAML for Docker & K8s configs
home.desc_generator: Generate sample JSON data for testing
home.desc_csv_to_json: Convert CSV spreadsheets to JSON arrays
home.desc_schema_validator: Validate JSON against a JSON Schema definition
home.desc_json_viewer: Explore JSON with interactive collapsible tree view
home.desc_converter_hub: All conversion tools in one place: CSV, Java, TS, YAML
home.feat_privacy: Your Data Never Leaves Your Browser
home.feat_privacy_desc: 100% client-side processing. No server uploads, no backend storage, no third-party access. Your sensitive JSON data stays on your device, always.
home.feat_allinone_desc: From formatting and validation to conversion and code generation — everything you need for JSON development, all in one place. No more tab-hopping between separate tools.
home.feat_free_desc: No registration. No subscription tiers. No hidden premium features. Every tool is free to use, as much as you need, whenever you need it.
repair.title: JSON Repair Tool
repair.subtitle: Fix invalid JSON automatically — single quotes, trailing commas, unquoted keys, comments, and more.
repair.fix_quotes_desc: Replaces 'single quotes' with "double quotes" around keys and string values.
repair.fix_trailing_desc: Strips extra commas before closing brackets and braces like {"a":1,} → {"a":1}.
repair.fix_keys_desc: Wraps unquoted object keys in double quotes: {name: "Tom"} → {"name": "Tom"}.
repair.fix_comments_desc: Removes // line comments, /* block comments */, Python-style # comments.
repair.fix_bool_desc: Converts Python True/False/None and JS undefined to valid JSON true/false/null.
repair.fix_brackets_desc: Detects and appends missing closing } and ] to make JSON parseable.
home.desc_repair: Fix invalid JSON — auto-repair single quotes, trailing commas & more
codegen.page_desc: Convert JSON to Python, Go, C#, Rust, Kotlin, TypeScript, Java POJO, SQL, and more. 100% client-side, your data stays private.
codegen.placeholder: Paste JSON here to generate code...
home.desc_codegen: Generate Python, Go, C#, Rust, SQL & more from JSON
schema.title: JSON Schema Generator
schema.subtitle: Automatically generate JSON Schema (draft-07) from your JSON data. Perfect for API documentation, contract testing, and data validation.
schema.placeholder: Paste JSON here to generate a schema...
schema.feature_types_desc: Detects string, number, integer, boolean, null, array, and object types automatically.
schema.feature_nested_desc: Handles deeply nested objects and arrays. Generates proper schema hierarchy with required fields.
schema.feature_formats_desc: Auto-detects date, date-time, email, URI, and phone formats from your data values.
home.desc_schema_gen: Generate JSON Schema from JSON data automatically
stats.title: JSON Statistics Analyzer
stats.subtitle: Analyze your JSON structure: see key counts, depth, type distribution, and file size. Perfect for understanding large or complex JSON data.
home.desc_stats: Analyze JSON structure: key count, depth, type distribution & more
flatten.title: JSON Flatten & Unflatten
flatten.subtitle: Convert between nested JSON and dot-notation flat format. Useful for ETL pipelines, log analysis, and data transformation.
flatten.placeholder: Paste nested JSON here to flatten...
home.desc_flatten: Flatten nested JSON to dot notation & unflatten back
playground.title: JSON Playground
playground.subtitle: Paste JSON once, explore it from every angle. Format, tree view, code generation, schema generation, and statistics — all in one place.
playground.hint_paste: Paste JSON above to get started
playground.hint_codegen: Select a language and click Generate
home.desc_playground: All-in-one JSON workspace: format, tree, code gen, schema & stats
api.title: API Response Tester
api.subtitle: Send HTTP requests and inspect JSON responses. Test REST APIs, view formatted JSON, headers, status codes — all from your browser.
api.hint: Enter an API URL above and click Send. Try the sample URLs to get started.
home.desc_api_tester: Test REST APIs: send requests, inspect JSON responses & headers
home.desc_md: Write and preview Markdown in real-time, export to HTML
home.desc_base64: Encode text to Base64 or decode Base64 back to text
home.desc_regex: Test regular expressions with live match highlighting
home.desc_codefmt: Beautify JavaScript, HTML, CSS & JSON code
codefmt.hint: Enter code above to see formatted result
